problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Epigenetic. Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
